name: python3-merge3
title: python3-merge3
description:
Python implementation of three-way merge
A Python implementation of 3-way merge of texts.
.
Given BASE, OTHER, THIS, tries to produce a combined text
incorporating the changes from both BASE->OTHER and BASE->THIS.
All three will typically be sequences of lines.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-merge3 because Python implementation of three-way merge.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-merge3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-merge3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-merge3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
